description: Perform a comprehensive mass effect assessment on the provided brain MRI, including midline shift, ventricular compression ratio, subfalcine and uncal herniation, sulcal effacement scoring, and overall grade. Save measurements to ~/Documents/SlicerData/BraTS/mass_effect_measurements.mrk.json, screenshots to ~/Documents/SlicerData/BraTS/screenshots/, and report to ~/Documents/SlicerData/BraTS/mass_effect_report.json with fields: midline_shift_mm, ipsilateral_ventricle_mm, contralateral_ventricle_mm, ventricular_ratio, subfalcine_herniation, subfalcine_extent_mm, sulcal_effacement_score, uncal_herniation, overall_grade, clinical_notes.
